title: g9-llmproxy — STAND-IN blinded review: a pinned cross-vendor LLM (GPT-5.6-Sol) fills the g9.review blinded-reviewer role over the SAME 50 blinded sheets (substitutability + cross-translatability, composite with the MEASURED mechanical legality leg) because the GATE-H blinded HUMAN review is unavailable at run time; deranged-explication probe as the content-scramble control on the substitutability leg, retest stability floor, zero GPU; the human-reviewed g9 remains FROZEN, unconsumed, and solely adjudicating for HS-A
hypotheses: H-G9P-ENDORSE (the only load-bearing hypothesis, scoped to the proxy): a kernel-instance-naive cross-vendor LLM reviewer, shown ONLY the blinded sheet bytes (word, def, examples, ambig examples, proposed paraphrase; reference explications and authoring notes withheld exactly as for the human), endorses the authored explications at the frozen g9 bar: one-sided 95% Wilson LB of the composite proxy rate >= 0.34 over the 50 sheets. A PASS is a WEAK FEASIBILITY SIGNAL only; a FAIL is the g9-kill analog at this proxy id (early warning, escalate)

H-G9P-STYLE (instrument alternative, controlled): high endorsement could be NSM-style/tradition familiarity rather than content judgment; the deranged-explication probe (own-paraphrase deranged out via seed-pinned Sattolo cycle; correct substitutability answer 'no' by construction) bounds the crude form on the substitutability leg ONLY — false-endorsement >= 0.30 invalidates the instrument, never reads as a hypothesis outcome; the cross-translatability leg has NO content-scramble control by construction (text-intrinsic property; disclosed weakening)
H-G9P-STABLE (instrument floor, FAIL-direction only): 10 seed-pinned duplicate sheets re-asked; raw per-field self-agreement < 0.80 invalidates; its pass direction validates nothing (single judge)

scale_rungs: none (blinded-review adjudication only; no host model; no GPU)

independent_vars.name: judge_role
levels: judge-r1p (GPT-5.6-Sol, sole proxy reviewer; LLM stand-in for the g9.review blinded-human role; CROSS-VENDOR mandatory — the 50 explications are Fable-authored, so a Claude-family judge would grade its own family's authoring)

independent_vars.name: item_set
levels: the 50 BLINDED review sheets (byte-identical to the human g9.review materials; sheet order seed-pinned g9lp/1|judge-r1p|20260710)
deranged-explication probe (50; instrument control, seed-pinned Sattolo pairing of word/examples with another sheet's paraphrase; never in labels or the composite rate)
retest duplicates (10; stability floor; never in labels)

dependent_vars.name: composite_rate_proxy
dependent_vars.definition: A_g9p = n_composite_pass_proxy / n_labelled: share of labelled sheets with mechanical legality (MEASURED 50/50 at g9.author) AND substitutable=yes AND cross_translatable=yes; cannot-say counts against composite pass; no-label sheets leave the denominator (capped by gate). Estimand is GPT-5.x-family endorsement under blind rendering, NOT blinded human review (envelope clause 1)

dependent_vars.name: probe_false_endorse_rate
dependent_vars.definition: share of labelled probe items with substitutable=yes where 'no' is correct by construction; point >= 0.30 invalidates the judge instrument (style-endorsement channel, crude form)

dependent_vars.name: sub_yes_rate
dependent_vars.definition: per-leg diagnostic: substitutability endorsement rate alone (reported-only)

dependent_vars.name: xt_yes_rate
dependent_vars.definition: per-leg diagnostic: cross-translatability endorsement rate alone; REPORTED-ONLY and flagged as the weakest leg (judged property, no content control; probe xt rate reported alongside as the content-insensitivity disclosure)

dependent_vars.name: retest_agreement
dependent_vars.definition: raw per-field self-agreement over the 10 duplicate sheets; < 0.80 invalidates; pass direction validates nothing

arms_mandatory_baselines: deranged-explication probe (the judge-level content-scramble control, house shuffled-kernel idiom: own paraphrase deranged out via seed-pinned Sattolo cycle => correct substitutability answer 'no' by construction; measures false-endorsement propensity = the channel that would fabricate a proxy-PASS from NSM-style familiarity)

deepnsm-8b-published-point-estimate (the frozen g9 comparator verbatim: published point 0.24, margin +0.10 => threshold 0.34; published CIs unavailable; SEVERITY-COMPARABILITY of a proxy judge to the published evaluation protocol is uncalibrated — named binding weakening, the margin comparison is form-preserving only)
kernel-as-text null and host-model arms: NOT APPLICABLE by design — no host model, no GPU cell; this record measures a reviewer's endorsement of authored explications, not model lift

n_planned.adjudication: judge-r1p (gpt-5.6-sol via npx-pinned codex-cli 0.144.1, reasoning effort low; invocation form byte-derived from the truthstyle-2x2 judges-invocation spec section 4.1) labels all 50 sheets in seed-pinned order, then the 50 probe items (g9lp/1|probe-order|20260710), then the 10 retest duplicates; per-item stateless hardened calls (empty out-of-repo workdir, user config ignored, memories + web search disabled, read-only sandbox, server-side output schema {substitutable, cross_translatable} each yes/no/cannot-say, zero-tool tripwire, first-valid-answer-final, <= 3 content attempts then no-label); preflight on 2 pinned calibration sheets must pass first-attempt before any real item; blinding grep audit per call (kernel/nsm/deepnsm/baartman/explication) — any hit aborts to the designer
n_planned.detectable_alternative: at expected composite rate 0.60 (the frozen g9 declaration), n=50 fully labelled: Wilson LB ~0.484 >= 0.34 (clears); FAIL-analog reachable from true rates <~0.22 (UB at 0.20, n=50 ~0.307 < 0.34); both branches remain live at the n_labelled floor 45
n_planned.instrument_gates: adjudication_valid: preflight_pass AND n_labelled >= 45 AND n_nolabel <= 5 AND retest raw per-field agreement >= 0.80. probe_valid: n_probe_labelled >= 45 AND probe substitutability false-endorsement point-rate < 0.30. Failures are INSTRUMENT-INVALID, never FAIL/PASS
n_planned.stage_discipline: freeze BEFORE any judge call; stage judge-invocation spec + prompt template + output schema + probe manifest + calibration items -> ops amendment pins them (artifact_hashes placeholders) -> preflight -> 50 real sheets -> 50 probes -> 10 retests -> assemble data/g9-review-llmproxy -> corpus-pin ops amendment -> log-append the single final-phase record -> verdict-gen -> cross-vendor audit (family overlap with the judge DISCLOSED; the audit is mechanical recomputation from pinned bytes and does not validate judge quality) -> Fable interpretive assessment

assumptions.claim: stand-in rationale: the frozen g9 record requires g9.review to be a blinded HUMAN review (GATE-H, ~4h); that human is unavailable at run time and the maintainer requested blind-LLM stand-ins for the outstanding human annotation passes (2026-07-10) so experiments run now and are human-verified later; this record is the SEPARATE, clearly-labelled stand-in on the f2b-transfer-llmproxy model — a fresh id, never a correction of g9; registered as ASM-0550 and ASM-0520

judge choice: cross-vendor is mandatory because the judged artifacts are Fable-authored (design-vs-judge separation); gpt-5.6-sol effort low under npx-pinned codex-cli 0.144.1 is the established pinned blind-judge mechanism (availability + invocation semantics MEASURED at the truthstyle-2x2 staging, 2026-07-10); registered as ASM-0520 and ASM-0551

metric operationalisation: substitutability and cross-translatability are rendered as per-sheet blind yes/no/cannot-say judgments from the sheet bytes only; if the human g9.review operationalises the published metric definitions differently (e.g. translation-based cross-translatability), the proxy legs are form-analogous only; composite = MEASURED mechanical legality AND both judged legs; registered as ASM-0521

severity-comparability: the proxy judge's strictness is uncalibrated to the published DeepNSM evaluation protocol, so clearing (or missing) the +0.10 margin vs the published 0.24 point is form-preserving only and cannot bear on HS-A; direction unproven; registered as ASM-0522, load_bearing false, resolved by the human g9.review on identical sheets

tradition-familiarity direction: NSM-style text is plausibly in the judge family's training data and plausibly inflates endorsement; direction and size unproven; registered as ASM-0552, load_bearing false, resolved by the human-vs-proxy delta on identical sheets

coverage disclosure (mandatory): kernel-expressibility coverage 0.3542 at rung molecules-v0, MEASURED by m0b on one incomplete kernel-v0 instance — NOT general coverage; the 50 sheets are DeepNSM test-split words, a favourable authoring surface, and no coverage-general authoring claim exists here

nothing here amends g9: its frozen record, blinded_review_done gate, GATE-H human review path and single review stage stand exactly as frozen; this record neither sets g9's review gate nor appends to its log; proxy outputs are quarantined from any future human reviewer (ASM-0553)

endpoints.test: one-sided alpha=0.05 (z=1.645, the pinned analysis/g9.py closed form): Wilson 95% LB of the composite proxy rate over labelled sheets vs margin_threshold = 0.24 + 0.10 = 0.34 (the frozen g9 bar verbatim). PASS-analog iff LB >= 0.34; FAIL-analog iff UB < 0.34; else INCONCLUSIVE — and the extrapolation envelope caps ANY PASS at 'weak feasibility proxy'
INSTRUMENT gate (never a hypothesis test): preflight_pass AND n_labelled >= 45 AND n_nolabel <= 5 AND retest raw per-field agreement >= 0.80; failure => INSTRUMENT-INVALID

INSTRUMENT gate, point rule: deranged-explication probe substitutability false-endorsement rate >= 0.30 OR n_probe_labelled < 45 => INSTRUMENT-INVALID; the probe is the judge-level content-scramble control on the substitutability leg only

REPORTED-ONLY: per-leg endorsement rates (substitutability alone; cross-translatability alone) + probe cross-translatability rate — the latter documents the xt leg's content-insensitivity by construction; carries no verdict weight
REPORTED-ONLY + consumed by the adjudication gate in its FAIL direction: raw self-agreement over 10 duplicates; high agreement validates nothing (single judge)

kill_criterion_verbatim: g9-llmproxy kill (PROXY-ONLY, zero GPU, the g9.review role filled by the pinned GPT-5.6-Sol stand-in): FAIL-analog fires iff the one-sided 95% Wilson UPPER bound of the composite proxy rate < 0.34 over the labelled sheets (composite = MEASURED mechanical legality AND substitutable=yes AND cross_translatable=yes; cannot-say counts against pass; no-label leaves the denominator, capped by gate). This mirrors the frozen g9 kill ('not decisively better than DeepNSM-8B') in FORM ONLY; it can neither fire nor discharge g9's own kill, whose reviewer is a blinded HUMAN (GATE-H), and it cannot weaken or strengthen the why-now argument or revert any authoring-cost estimate — a proxy FAIL-analog warrants pausing authoring-cost claims and escalating to the maintainer, formally scoped to this proxy id. Degeneracy discipline (INSTRUMENT-INVALID, never FAIL/PASS): preflight failure; n_labelled < 45 of 50; n_nolabel > 5; retest raw agreement < 0.80; probe false-endorsement >= 0.30 or probe coverage < 45/50 (a judge endorsing substitutability of deranged paraphrases at >= 0.30 is answering from style/familiarity, and its endorsement of the real sheets cannot be read as content endorsement — exactly the channel that would fabricate a proxy-PASS).
extrapolation_envelope_verbatim: Binding on ANY verdict of this record and on every citation of its numbers. STAND-IN, NOT THE ADJUDICATING REVIEW: the g9.review blinded-reviewer role is filled by a pinned LLM (GPT-5.6-Sol via npx-pinned codex-cli 0.144.1, reasoning effort low) because the blinded HUMAN reviewer the frozen g9 record requires (GATE-H, ~4h) is unavailable at run time; g9 (frozen_sha256 cf56c5cea66c7207cbd693914eebcf0d0244c8d5ef249f5065300eff8ab00aa8) remains FROZEN, unconsumed, and is the ONLY experiment on this line whose readout adjudicates HS-A. The composite score here IS one LLM's blind endorsement of substitutability and cross-translatability — NOT a blinded human review and NOT the published DeepNSM evaluation protocol. Binding weakenings: (1) SINGLE LLM REVIEWER — the estimand is 'GPT-5.x-family endorsement of the authored explications under blind sheet rendering', which family-level bias can inflate or deflate independent of real explication quality; there is no second reviewer; the retest floor is stability only and validates nothing in its pass direction. (2) TRADITION FAMILIARITY — the judge is kernel-instance-naive by context control but NOT NSM-tradition-naive (ASM-0552): it may endorse a familiar reductive-paraphrase STYLE rather than judge substitutability from language competence — a channel that inflates the composite rate; the deranged-explication probe bounds only its crudest form, and ONLY on the substitutability leg. (3) CROSS-TRANSLATABILITY IS THE WEAKEST LEG — it is operationalised as a judged text-intrinsic property (ASM-0521), has NO content-scramble control by construction, and is form-analogous at best to the published metric definition; its endorsement rate is disclosed per-leg so no reader can attribute composite strength to it silently. (4) SEVERITY-COMPARABILITY UNCALIBRATED (ASM-0522) — the +0.10 margin vs the published 0.24 point presumes protocol-comparable judge severity; a proxy judge's severity is unknown relative to the published evaluation, so clearing or missing the margin is form-preserving only: NEITHER outcome bears on HS-A, the why-now argument, or authoring-cost estimates in any plan document. (5) LICENSE OF A PASS — a PASS means exactly: 'a kernel-instance-naive cross-vendor LLM, under blind sheet rendering with a working escape, endorses the 50 Fable-authored explications at the frozen composite bar'. It is a WEAK FEASIBILITY PROXY (ASM-0550). It does NOT discharge g9's blinded_review_done gate, does NOT adjudicate HS-A, does NOT substitute for the GATE-H human review, does NOT license any authoring-cost claim in any prospectus or plan document, and does NOT extend to human reviewers, other authoring runs, other word sets, or any coverage-general claim (kernel-expressibility coverage 0.3542 at rung molecules-v0, MEASURED by m0b on one incomplete kernel-v0 instance, restated mandatorily). (6) ASYMMETRIC READING — the named channels plausibly push endorsement UP, so FAIL-analog is the more informative outcome: it warrants pausing authoring-cost claims and escalating to the maintainer, while remaining formally scoped to this proxy id; a PASS licenses only continued investment (human reviewer recruitment, authoring-pipeline continuation) and never upgrades any claim. (7) Sheet bytes and the withheld-reference blinding are byte-identical to the human g9.review materials; per-sheet proxy labels are pinned so the eventual human review yields a free human-vs-proxy bias measurement (ASM-0553); nothing else carries over.

corpus_hashes._recipe: kot-corpus-hash/1: digest = sha256 over the UTF-8 concatenation of one line per regular file under data/<corpus>/ (recursive; symlinks and directories excluded), each line '<sha256-of-file-bytes-hex>  <relpath>\n' with exactly two spaces, relpath POSIX-style ('/'-separated) relative to data/<corpus>/, lines sorted by the UTF-8 byte order of relpath; reference implementation tools/registry/corpus-pin.py
corpus_hashes.g9-review-llmproxy: PINNED-AT-INPUTS:judge-r1p responses + probe responses + labels-proxy + summary, pinned by ops amendment after the judge run and before the final-phase record

model_revisions._note: no host models: zero GPU cells in this record
model_revisions.judge-r1p: gpt-5.6-sol via npx-pinned codex-cli 0.144.1, reasoning effort low (catalog + invocation semantics MEASURED at the truthstyle-2x2 staging 2026-07-10; re-verify version banner at preflight)

runner_constraints.infra: sequential per-item codex exec calls, concurrency 1
runner_constraints.harness: poc/g9-llmproxy/judge-invocation.md (mechanical; staged + pinned pre-run; any undecided situation is a BOUNDARY STOP back to the designer, never runner improvisation)
runner_constraints.authorization: maintainer-requested stand-in (2026-07-10): blind-LLM proxies for the outstanding human annotation passes, human-verified later, per the f2b-transfer-llmproxy precedent (ASM-0550); usd_cap 10 sits inside every auto-authorization envelope; budget.maintainer_signoff reserved for Tier-5 records and deliberately absent
